response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their career is dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile stacks, with no evidence of financial systems development or Windows-based C++ work.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background across diverse technologies
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ experience on Windows — critical for the role
No evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle context

key_factors.factor: Generic SQL skills without required DB platforms
